summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. All 6 user-requested changes verified: (1) DB env vars working, (2) emergentintegrations removed/google-genai used, (3) No Emergent branding in code, (4) No 'Made with Emergent' badge on any page, (5) Password toggle on login works, (6) 63 Vietnamese provinces + 696 chained districts on register page. All 19 backend API tests pass. All frontend flows working.

integration_issues.issue: Returns 500 due to Gemini free-tier quota exhausted - NOT a code bug, integration is correctly wired to Google API
integration_issues.note: Expected behavior per agent_to_agent_context_note. UI handles error gracefully.

issues: Some TEST_ prefixed products from previous tests have broken image URLs (shows alt text)

backend: POST /api/chat - Chat endpoint wired (500 quota expected)
POST /api/ocr/identify - OCR endpoint wired (500 quota expected)
frontend: Homepage loads with Vietnamese title 'Cửa Hàng Hữu Cơ'
No 'Made with Emergent' badge on homepage
Login page - password toggle button exists (data-testid='toggle-password-visibility')
Login page - password field toggles between type='password' and type='text'
Register page - province dropdown shows 63 Vietnamese provinces
Register page - district dropdown disabled until province selected
Register page - selecting province enables district dropdown with correct districts
Register page - changing province resets district to empty
Register page - full registration flow works end-to-end
Admin products page - no Emergent badge
Chat page loads - no Emergent badge
OCR search page loads - no Emergent badge

verified_changes.db_env_vars: VERIFIED - server.py uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] and os.environ['DB_NAME']
verified_changes.emergentintegrations_removed: VERIFIED - requirements.txt has google-genai, no emergentintegrations
verified_changes.google_genai_used: VERIFIED - server.py imports from google import genai, uses gemini_client.aio.models.generate_content
verified_changes.no_emergent_branding: VERIFIED - grep found no 'emergent' references in App.js, index.html, server.py
verified_changes.no_emergent_badge: VERIFIED - Playwright tests confirmed no 'Made with Emergent' on homepage, login, register, admin, chat, OCR pages
verified_changes.password_toggle: VERIFIED - Eye/EyeOff toggle button with data-testid='toggle-password-visibility' toggles password visibility
verified_changes.vietnamese_provinces: VERIFIED - vn-provinces.json has 63 provinces and 696 districts
verified_changes.chained_districts: VERIFIED - District dropdown disabled until province selected, shows correct districts per province, resets on province change

critical_code_review_comments: google-genai SDK properly integrated (async client, Part.from_bytes for images)
Province/district data is comprehensive (63 provinces, 696 districts)
Password toggle UX is good with Eye/EyeOff icons
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 user-requested changes verified working: (1) DB env vars, (2) google-genai SDK replacing emergentintegrations, (3) No Emergent branding, (4) No Emergent badge, (5) Password toggle on login, (6) 63 provinces + 696 chained districts. Chat/OCR return 500 due to Gemini quota - this is expected external limitation, not code bug.
